extract_protocol_ch1: PerfectPure RNA Blood kit (5 PRIME Inc, Gaithersburg, MD, USA)
label_protocol_ch1: Biotynlated cRNA were generated following manufacturer protocols from 200 - 250ng of the globin-reduced RNA using the Illumina CustomPrep RNA amplification kit (Applied Biosystems/Ambion, Austin, TX, USA)
scan_protocol: SentrixScanVersion 2.3.0.13  (This information is in the .XML file)
source_name_ch1: Whole Blood from patient with Latent TB
